DE11_pagination.label: Pagination
DE11_pagination.description: Les endpoints de collection doivent supporter la pagination (page/size ou limit/offset).

DE08_fields.label: Filtrage de champs
DE08_fields.description: Supporter un parametre 'fields' pour reduire le payload.

DE01_compression.label: Compression
DE01_compression.description: Le serveur doit supporter Accept-Encoding: gzip.

DE02_DE03_cache.label: Cache ETag/304
DE02_DE03_cache.description: Les ressources unitaires doivent supporter ETag + If-None-Match -> 304.

candidates.reason: No ETag header in HEAD response
No ETag header in HEAD response
No ETag header in HEAD response
No ETag header in HEAD response
No ETag header in HEAD response

suggestions.action: Add ETag support and If-None-Match → 304 Not Modified
suggestions.impact: +15 pts — avoids resending unchanged resources, saves bandwidth

DE06_delta.label: Delta / Changes
DE06_delta.description: Un endpoint /changes?since= ou equivalent doit exister.

range_206.label: Range / Partial Content
range_206.description: Supporter le header Range pour les gros payloads.

AR02_format_cbor.label: Format binaire (CBOR)
AR02_format_cbor.description: Un endpoint en format binaire (CBOR, protobuf...) doit exister.

LO01_observability.label: Observabilite
LO01_observability.description: Actuator / health / metrics doit etre expose.

US07_rate_limit.label: Rate Limiting
US07_rate_limit.description: Un mecanisme de rate limiting doit etre present.

discovered_endpoints.summary: Get account application detail (supports field filtering)

List my payments (supports pagination & field filtering)
List my documents (supports pagination & field filtering)
Resend signature request to pending signers
Live/in-person signature on behalf of a signer
List my account applications (supports pagination & field filtering)
Submit an account application for review
Generate contract PDF for the application
Get payments changed since a given timestamp (delta sync)
Download document file (supports Range/206 partial content)
Get documents changed since a given timestamp (delta sync)
Get current authenticated user (supports field filtering)
List available account types (supports field filtering)
Get applications changed since a given timestamp (delta sync)
